purpose: Govern controlled public terminology, drift triggers, and replacement rules for DFW Matchday Concierge.

controlled_term_sets.canonical_supporting_language: Black Executive Vehicle Class may include Black Executive SUVs and other eligible executive-class vehicles, subject to operator review, availability, passenger fit, luggage fit, route needs, comfort requirements, and quote confirmation.
controlled_term_sets.required_public_boundary: Vehicle class and operator assignment are confirmed only after operator review, quote, payment/deposit approval, and availability confirmation.

controlled_term_sets.canonical_term: DreamHost production deployment remains blocked until validation, mobile review, QR review, claim review, and explicit user approval pass.
Live AI, payment, dispatch, routing, driver assignment, concierge assignment, and fulfillment automation remain blocked unless separately approved.

audit_policy.failure_policy: Any forbidden controlled term outside its allowed reference files fails the audit. Any required canonical term missing from a required file fails the audit.
